Properties.Description: Triggers the Lambda to fetch OpenDental schedules and update ClinicHoursTable hourly.

Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when clinic-hours-crud Lambda has errors
Alert when clinic-hours-crud Lambda is throttled
Alert when clinic-hours-crud Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when hours-scheduler Lambda has errors
Alert when hours-scheduler Lambda is throttled
Alert when hours-scheduler Lambda p99 duration exceeds 48000ms (~80% of timeout)

ClinicHoursTableName.Description: Name of the Clinic Hours DynamoDB table

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
